purpose: Structured trip-report corpus feeding generative GLSL + ASCII art via Google AI Studio. Grimoire architecture: dual-schema metadata (Standard / Weird) per trip. Astral projection reports and recurring-pattern reports have their own homes.

associations.tetragrammaton: partial, user-declared — often watched beforehand, occurs independently

astral_projection.title: Indra's Net Overflight
astral_projection.status: stub (recovered material — awaiting user's own report)

ingestion_notes.preferred_format: processed markdown with YAML frontmatter, or consolidated JSON when generated
ingestion_notes.seed_policy: glsl_seeds and ascii_seeds are conceptual guides for AI Studio to riff on — not final art to copy
ingestion_notes.metadata_policy: user-estimated recall; blanks are intentional and must be preserved
ingestion_notes.imagery_policy: strain names are labels only — no literal imagery derived from them (no nautical motifs for Shipwrekt); water in the corpus is cleansing/vertical/one-way, never nautical
ingestion_notes.contamination_policy: material not present in RAW or user-RECOVERED sources requires explicit user confirmation before canonization; user-declared associations are logged with their stated strength; cross-corpus loop-ins get logged in the integration Corrections Log
